goal: Nightly server-side Salesforce portfolio inventory: pulls the user's dashboards, per-dashboard widget->report mapping via /analytics/dashboards/describe, batches Report LastRunDate, and writes the cross-dashboard shared+stale aggregate to the ledger. Ghost-Shift-safe: class 0, read-only, no DOM, no Chrome.
successCriteria: no class >= 1 nodes and no dangerous side effects

nodes.title: Pull nightly SF portfolio inventory
nodes.description: Invoke salesforce.portfolio-inventory read mode against the preprod org, 30-day stale threshold, limit 40 dashboards. Serializes the cross-dashboard aggregate to observedState; ledger captures the full result as the invocation.end payload for cross-session comparison.
